DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: MARTE J. BASSI FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY: JORGE L. MARTINEZ. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONDUCT DISCOVERY OF DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL CONDITION PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3295 IS GRANTED IN PART. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF IS PERMITTED TO PROPOUND ONE SET OF INTERROGATORIES AND ONE DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO BRING THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS TO TRIAL UNDER SEAL, MAKING THEM AVAILABLE TO PLAINTIFF ONLY IF THE TRIER OF FACT SHOULD DETERMINE THAT THE DEFENDANTS WERE GUILTY OF MALICE, OPPRESSION, OR FRAUD PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294 ET SEQ. ALL REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
